\tzpentry{ID5850}{Curvature Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5850 introduces Curvature Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} Re_m = \frac{\mu_0 \sigma v L}{1} > Re_{m,critical} \approx 10^3 \end{equation}
